creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
firefox 119.0 is out, but unfortunately still crashes with SIGSEGV on built with -O3 binary.
The binary built with -O0 using patch on Comment #32 runs fine but slow.
Note that the patch applies with offset -9 lines due to the commit ports eb9f07125e7dba4f6666f8542632ee636970b272 to /usr/ports/Mk/bsd.gecko.mk, but actually no problem.
